title: Transit Facilities Maintenance and Signposting Services
summary: LADOT seeks proposals to manage, maintain, and landscape twelve facilities including five Metrolink stations, two park-and-ride lots, one passenger transit hub, and one vacant lot. Work includes sign management and maintenance. Five-year contract expected to extend through 2027 Super Bowl and 2028 Olympic Games.

title: Rapid Response Contractors for LIRR State of Good Repair Work
summary: LIRR is seeking rapid response contractors to support state of good repair maintenance and repair work across the railroad system. This is an on-call/as-needed contract for ongoing operational maintenance activities.
agency: NY MTA — Long Island Rail Road

title: Continuous Welded Rail (CWR) Hauling Train
summary: LIRR is soliciting a Request for Expression of Interest (RFEI) for continuous welded rail hauling train services to support railroad infrastructure maintenance and replacement activities.
agency: NY MTA — Long Island Rail Road
